# arubacloud_project (Data Source)

Retrieves read-only information about an existing `arubacloud_project`. Use this data source to reference the project ID when the project is managed in a separate root module.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "arubacloud_project" "basic" {
  id = "project-id"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Arguments

The following arguments are supported:

#### Required

- `id` (String) Computed by the API. Unique identifier for the resource.

### Attributes Reference

In addition to all arguments above, the following attributes are exported:

#### Read-Only

- `description` (String) Optional human-readable description of the project.
- `name` (String) Display name for the Project.
- `tags` (List of String) List of string tags attached to the resource for filtering and organisation.
